title: Resource Tree
description: Organize your resource packs into folders — drag & drop, navigate, color-code, rename, delete, create folders, search, sort, and manage each pack in-game with ease.
body:
**Resource Tree** adds folder navigation to Minecraft's resource pack screen, so you can organize your packs into subfolders instead of scrolling through one massive list.
--- ## 📁 Features ### 🌿 Folder Navigation * Subfolders inside your `resourcepacks` directory automatically appear in the resource pack screen * Click the **→** arrow or double-click a folder to navigate into it * A **← Back** entry appears at the top so you can navigate back up * Each folder shows a **pack count** next to `` indicating how many packs are directly inside ### 🎨 Folder Options * **Right-click** any folder to open a context menu * Pick from 6 colors to color-code your folders: Default, Red, Blue, Green, Purple, and White * Colors are saved and persist across game restarts * **Rename** a folder directly inline * **Delete** a folder (with confirmation if it contains files) ### ✅ Enable / Disable All * **Right-click** a folder and click **Enable All →** to move all packs inside it to Selected at once * Click **Disable All ←** to move them all back to Available * Only affects packs directly inside that folder — nested subfolders are not affected ### ➕ New Folder * Click the **`+`** button next to the **`≡`** button to create a new folder in the current directory * Instantly enters rename mode so you can name it right away ### 📊 Advanced Sorting `▫️NEW▫️` * Click the **`⇅`** button next to the search bar to open the sort menu * Sort your packs by **Name (A-Z)**, **Name (Z-A)**, **Date (Newest)**, or **Date (Oldest)** * Sort setting is saved and persists across game restarts * Folders always stay pinned to the top regardless of sort mode ### 🖱️ Drag & Drop `▫️NEW▫️` * Hold and drag any resource pack from the available list to move it into a folder * A ghost preview follows your cursor while dragging * Hover over a folder to highlight it as a drop target — release to move the pack inside * Drag onto the **← Back** entry to move a pack up one folder level * **Shift+left-click** any resource pack to instantly move it to the Selected list ### ⚙️ Options Menu Click the **`≡`** button next to "Open Pack Folder" to open the options menu. * **Hide Defaults** — hides High Contrast and Programmer Art from the available list * **Hide Pack Warnings** — hides the red warning color on outdated resource packs * **Search in Folders** — makes the search box look inside subfolders too

## 🔧 Compatibility * ⚠️ **[Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)** — dragging packs from Available to Selected may behave unexpectedly — use the arrow button or shift+click instead. * ➕ **[Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify)** — works great for browsing and installing packs directly in-game.
